movie.synopsis: To save his wife A Rou, Lang Wujue sets out on a dangerous demon-hunting journey but is tricked by Daoist Baiyun and transformed into a beast. With A Rou’s awakened spirit, she begins a long, difficult quest to break the curse and restore his humanity.
